query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.projectId,
  pr.name as projectName,
  p.amount,
  p.type,
  p.movementType,
  p.receivedAt,
  p.method,
  u.name as registeredBy
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN projects pr ON p.projectId = pr.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.registeredBy = u.id
ORDER BY p.receivedAt DESC
LIMIT 30

  pr.name as projectName,
  p.amount,
  p.type,

  p.method,
  u.name as registeredBy
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN projects pr ON p.projectId = pr.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.registeredBy = u.id
ORDER BY p.receivedAt DESC
LIMIT 30
